templates.title: City Map
templates.description: Arranges services, stores, queues, and ownership zones as city blocks for quick spatial scanning.

templates.title: Constellation
templates.description: Places related capabilities in an orbit so ownership, dependencies, and coordination points are easy to scan.

templates.title: Control Room
templates.description: Summarizes operational signals as a control room for queues, latency, error budget, and readiness.

templates.title: Diff Split View
templates.description: Compares before and after graph states so reviewers can follow changed nodes, transitions, and risk flags.

templates.title: Document Wall
templates.description: Pins claims and source cards into a document wall for reviewing provenance, freshness, and contradictions.

templates.title: Flow Particles
templates.description: Animates ordered handoffs between producers, processors, reviewers, and completion gates.

templates.title: Graph 2 5D
templates.description: Layers graph nodes by ownership, status, and depth so dense dependency maps stay readable.

templates.title: Graph 3D
templates.description: Places major nodes, edges, and hotspots into a depth based graph for exploring complex systems.

templates.title: Layered Stack
templates.description: Maps a layered system from domain model through adapters, policy, telemetry, and release boundary.

templates.title: Matrix Board
templates.description: Positions work items by priority and effort while preserving owner, status, and risk context.

templates.title: Orbit System
templates.description: Shows a central system with related teams, dependencies, controls, and checks in orbital bands.

templates.title: Pipeline Flow
templates.description: Connects staged work from intake through build, validation, approval, and release handoff.

templates.title: Radar Sphere
templates.description: Plots entities by exposure, confidence, and urgency for portfolio or health review.

templates.title: Radial Tree
templates.description: Branches a root subject into causes, decisions, owners, and follow up paths.

templates.title: Replay Stage
templates.description: Replays event sequences with actors, commands, transitions, and outcomes on a staged timeline.

templates.title: Sankey 3D
templates.description: Traces volume movement between sources, processing stages, sinks, and loss points.

templates.title: State Machine
templates.description: Documents allowed states, transitions, guards, and terminal outcomes for a process.

templates.title: Swimlane Timeline
templates.description: Splits time ordered events across owners or systems so parallel progress and handoffs stay visible.

templates.title: Terrain Heatmap
templates.description: Turns scored items into terrain so clusters, outliers, and high pressure areas stand out.

templates.title: Timeline Tunnel
templates.description: Shows release milestones moving through an ordered tunnel of decisions, risks, rehearsal, and final signoff.

templates.title: Active Run Monitor
templates.description: Monitors active agent work across queued tasks, running commands, edits, tests, and final handoff.

templates.title: Confidence Map
templates.description: Links agent conclusions to evidence, counterevidence, source reliability, and confidence levels.

templates.title: Context Window Map
templates.description: Tracks context chunks by relevance, freshness, token weight, and whether they are still needed.

templates.title: Debug Blackbox
templates.description: Reconstructs a failed agent run from prompt intake through tool output, validation, and recovery.

templates.title: Failure Recovery Tree
templates.description: Branches agent failures into symptoms, suspected causes, retry choices, and verified recovery steps.

templates.title: Permission Gate Map
templates.description: Maps the approval gates an agent must pass before writes, network calls, destructive actions, and publication.

templates.title: React Loop Replay
templates.description: Replays observe, think, act, and validate cycles with tool calls and decision checkpoints.

templates.title: Run Replay Timeline
templates.description: Shows an agent run as a replayable sequence of planning, edits, checks, and final response.

templates.title: Run Trace
templates.description: Follows an agent run from user request through planning, tool calls, validation, and final response.

templates.title: Session State Panel
templates.description: Displays session state such as context budget, open work, command state, and verification readiness.

templates.title: Step Ladder
templates.description: Breaks an agent task into ordered steps with prerequisites, evidence, and completion state.

templates.title: Subagent Swarm
templates.description: Coordinates specialist agents, assigned scopes, shared artifacts, and merge or handoff points.

templates.title: Thinking Timeline
templates.description: Tracks reasoning checkpoints across context scan, hypothesis, validation, and answer assembly.

templates.title: Tool Call Constellation
templates.description: Shows tool calls as a constellation around the run, including reads, edits, validation, and push steps.

templates.title: Tool Io Inspector
templates.description: Compares tool inputs and outputs so arguments, files, command results, and errors can be inspected.

templates.title: API Surface Map
templates.description: Maps exported endpoints, callers, owners, version contracts, and compatibility risk.

templates.title: Bug Localization Map
templates.description: Connects symptoms, logs, failing tests, touched modules, and likely fix targets for a bug.

templates.title: Call Path Tube
templates.description: Traces request or function call paths through packages, adapters, branches, and exit points.

templates.title: Config Dependency Map
templates.description: Shows how config keys feed services, feature flags, secrets, and deployment behavior.

templates.title: Coverage Terrain
templates.description: Plots packages by coverage, churn, risk, and ownership to expose weak test terrain.

templates.title: Dead Code Detector
templates.description: Groups unused symbols, unreachable modules, stale entrypoints, and cleanup confidence.

templates.title: Dependency Upgrade Risk
templates.description: Assesses dependency upgrades by consumers, breaking changes, test coverage, and rollout risk.

templates.title: Diff Impact Ripple
templates.description: Shows how a changed file ripples into modules, tests, API contracts, downstream UI, and risk metrics.

templates.title: Galaxy
templates.description: Organizes repository areas into a galaxy of packages, tests, shared helpers, and release scripts.

templates.title: Git History River
templates.description: Shows commits, authors, release points, reverts, and hot files along a repository history stream.

templates.title: Hotspot City
templates.description: Places churn heavy files, fragile modules, owners, and test gaps into a code hotspot city.

templates.title: Migration Progress Map
templates.description: Tracks migration stages from legacy modules through adapters, tests, rollout, and cleanup.

templates.title: Module Dependency Graph
templates.description: Connects modules, helper packages, tests, and scripts to show dependency direction and ownership.

templates.title: Monorepo Workspace Map
templates.description: Maps packages, apps, shared libraries, build boundaries, and team ownership in a monorepo.

templates.title: Ownership Map
templates.description: Connects files, services, teams, reviewers, and backup owners for stewardship review.

templates.title: PR Diff Impact Map
templates.description: Shows how pull request changes touch modules, tests, contracts, reviewers, and release risk.

templates.title: Refactor Plan Map
templates.description: Lays out refactor targets, dependencies, staging strategy, and validation gates.

templates.title: Security Sensitive Files Map
templates.description: Highlights sensitive files, boundaries, data flows, reviewers, and required checks.

templates.title: Symbol Graph
templates.description: Links symbols, call sites, packages, and tests to explain code navigation and impact.

templates.title: Test Failure Map
templates.description: Links failing tests to assertions, affected modules, fixtures, and the fix candidate under review.

templates.title: Adapter Proxy Map
templates.description: Maps adapters, proxy hops, retries, auth boundaries, and downstream service dependencies.

templates.title: Agent Fleet Dashboard
templates.description: Shows the health of a runtime agent fleet across active runs, queues, tool latency, and failure rates.

templates.title: API Contract Map
templates.description: Connects API producers, consumers, schemas, compatibility status, and contract test coverage.

templates.title: Capability Matrix
templates.description: Compares runtime capabilities by owner, maturity, availability, and operational readiness.

templates.title: Config Overlay View
templates.description: Stacks default, environment, secret, and runtime overrides to explain effective configuration.

templates.title: Deployment Pipeline 3D
templates.description: Tracks build artifacts through deploy stages, checks, approvals, and rollback points.

templates.title: Event Bus Flow
templates.description: Shows event bus flow from producer through broker, consumers, dead letter handling, and observability.

templates.title: Event Reconcile Loop
templates.description: Explains how live portal events and OpenCode stream updates reconcile with snapshots and duplicate suppression.

templates.title: Health Radar
templates.description: Plots services by saturation, errors, latency, dependency health, and incident exposure.

templates.title: K8s Pod Constellation
templates.description: Groups Kubernetes pods, deployments, services, config maps, and failing workloads.

templates.title: MCP Server Status Map
templates.description: Summarizes MCP servers by tool availability, latency, auth state, and failure signals.

templates.title: Network Boundary Map
templates.description: Shows network zones, trusted edges, ingress points, egress rules, and boundary controls.

templates.title: Permission Boundary Map
templates.description: Maps actors, roles, guarded actions, approval points, and denied paths across a runtime.

templates.title: Restart Map
templates.description: Traces restart triggers, dependency order, degraded periods, and service recovery outcomes.

templates.title: Sandbox Layer Stack
templates.description: Stacks sandbox permissions, filesystem scope, network policy, and command execution boundaries.

templates.title: Secret Flow Map
templates.description: Tracks secret sources, injection points, consumers, rotation state, and exposure controls.

templates.title: Service Topology
templates.description: Maps runtime services, adapters, queues, stores, and health probes in a service topology.

templates.title: Session Binding Map
templates.description: Connects browser tabs, CLI sessions, runtime adapters, and artifact paths to their active session binding.

templates.title: Tool Registry Map
templates.description: Organizes registered tools, schemas, owners, health checks, and version compatibility.

templates.title: Topology
templates.description: Shows core runtime components, queues, stores, adapters, and operational links.

templates.title: Alert Correlation Map
templates.description: Clusters alerts by shared service, symptom, dependency, time window, and likely incident.

templates.title: Before After Compare
templates.description: Compares system state before and after a fix, deploy, rollback, or configuration change.

templates.title: Blast Radius Sphere
templates.description: Estimates impacted users, services, data paths, and rollback scope around a failure.

templates.title: CI Failure Timeline
templates.description: Orders CI job starts, failures, retries, artifact checks, and fix verification events.

templates.title: Config Drift Map
templates.description: Compares expected and observed configuration across environments, owners, and drift severity.

templates.title: Dependency Failure Map
templates.description: Connects a failing dependency to callers, retries, fallbacks, alerts, and customer impact.

templates.title: Dependency Version Conflict
templates.description: Shows conflicting package versions, dependents, lockfiles, and resolution candidates.

templates.title: Error Budget Burn
templates.description: Tracks error budget consumption alongside incidents, deploys, mitigations, and recovery.

templates.title: Error Spike Field
templates.description: Places error spikes by endpoint, time, status code, and related deploy or traffic signals.

templates.title: Flaky Test Radar
templates.description: Plots flaky tests by failure rate, owner, runtime cost, and confidence in quarantine or fix.

templates.title: Incident Timeline
templates.description: Lays out incident detection, mitigation, rollback, customer update, and postmortem events in order.

templates.title: Latency Heatmap
templates.description: Maps latency by endpoint, dependency, percentile, and time window to reveal hotspots.

templates.title: Log Cluster Map
templates.description: Groups log signatures, affected services, example messages, and suspected causes.

templates.title: Queue Backlog Map
templates.description: Shows queue depth, worker health, age, retry pressure, and throughput blockers.

templates.title: Recovery Playbook View
templates.description: Steps through detection, mitigation, rollback, validation, and handoff tasks in a recovery playbook.

templates.title: Regression Detector
templates.description: Tracks metric and test regressions against commits, deploy windows, and suspect changes.

templates.title: Resource Pressure Map
templates.description: Plots CPU, memory, disk, connection, and queue pressure by component and severity.

templates.title: Retry Storm Map
templates.description: Shows retry loops, callers, throttles, backoff gaps, and downstream saturation.

templates.title: Root Cause Tree
templates.description: Branches symptoms, contributing changes, failed safeguards, and confirmed cause into a root cause tree.

templates.title: Trace Waterfall 3D
templates.description: Orders trace spans by service, duration, wait time, and failing dependency.

templates.title: Blocker Funnel
templates.description: Funnels project blockers from discovery through owner assignment, mitigation, and closure.

templates.title: Bug Triage Board
templates.description: Organizes bugs by severity, owner, reproduction status, customer impact, and next action.

templates.title: Confluence Space Map
templates.description: Maps Confluence spaces, page trees, owners, stale areas, and linked project artifacts.

templates.title: Cross Doc Citation Graph
templates.description: Connects documents, cited decisions, source claims, and conflicting references across a project.

templates.title: Decision Record Wall
templates.description: Displays decision records with status, rationale, owners, supporting evidence, and superseded notes.

templates.title: Doc Freshness Map
templates.description: Plots project documents by freshness, owner, review state, and release relevance.

templates.title: Epic Story Map
templates.description: Breaks epics into stories, dependencies, acceptance signals, and release slices.

templates.title: Issue Age Heatmap
templates.description: Plots issues by age, priority, owner, workflow state, and escalation risk.

templates.title: Issue Dependency Graph
templates.description: Connects Jira issues, blockers, owners, acceptance criteria, and release dependencies.

templates.title: PR Review Map
templates.description: Connects pull requests, reviewers, touched areas, pending comments, and merge blockers.

templates.title: Release Readiness Dashboard
templates.description: Summarizes release gates, open risks, test status, approvals, and rollback readiness.

templates.title: Release Train
templates.description: Tracks features and fixes as they board, validate, and leave a release train.

templates.title: Requirements To Code Trace
templates.description: Traces a requirement through design documentation, Jira work, pull request, changed files, tests, and release checks.

templates.title: Review Bottleneck Map
templates.description: Shows stalled reviews by reviewer, waiting time, file area, and unblock action.

templates.title: Risk Matrix
templates.description: Plots project risks by likelihood, impact, owner, mitigation, and review state.

templates.title: Roadmap Milestone Path
templates.description: Orders roadmap milestones with dependencies, confidence, launch criteria, and risk notes.

templates.title: Sprint Board 3D
templates.description: Places sprint work by status, owner, priority, capacity, and blocked state.

templates.title: Stakeholder Network
templates.description: Maps stakeholders, decision rights, communication channels, dependencies, and escalation paths.

templates.title: Support Escalation Graph
templates.description: Connects support cases, impacted customers, engineering owners, severity, and resolution path.

templates.title: Velocity Flow
templates.description: Tracks work entering, moving through, and leaving delivery stages with throughput signals.

templates.title: Answer Lineage View
templates.description: Shows answer claims back to sources, assumptions, confidence, and unresolved evidence gaps.

templates.title: Argument Map
templates.description: Maps positions, supporting claims, objections, sources, and confidence for a decision debate.

templates.title: Citation Map
templates.description: Connects sources, cited claims, reliability, recency, and gaps in a citation set.

templates.title: Claim Evidence Tree
templates.description: Branches each claim into supporting, refuting, and contextual sources with confidence.

templates.title: Comparison Table 3D
templates.description: Compares options by criteria, score, evidence strength, and unresolved tradeoffs.

templates.title: Concept Dependency Tree
templates.description: Shows prerequisite concepts, dependent ideas, learning order, and weak understanding areas.

templates.title: Decision Matrix
templates.description: Scores decision options against criteria, risks, evidence, and implementation constraints.

templates.title: Design Tradeoff Radar
templates.description: Plots design choices by cost, reversibility, risk, performance, and confidence.

templates.title: Document Cluster Map
templates.description: Groups related documents by topic, source type, freshness, and evidence role.

templates.title: Document Diff Map
templates.description: Compares document revisions, changed claims, missing evidence, and review implications.

templates.title: Evidence Board
templates.description: Boards claims, sources, reliability, confidence, and support or refute links for a decision.

templates.title: Faq Constellation
templates.description: Clusters common questions, answers, source links, ownership, and update priority.

templates.title: Graph
templates.description: Connects concepts, facts, owners, references, and unresolved gaps in a knowledge graph.

templates.title: Research Timeline
templates.description: Orders research findings, source reviews, decisions, and follow up questions over time.

templates.title: Semantic Search Landscape
templates.description: Plots search results by relevance, source type, confidence, and topic cluster.

templates.title: Source Gap Map
templates.description: Shows claims with missing, weak, refuting, or outdated sources and their confidence impact.

templates.title: Source Reliability Matrix
templates.description: Compares sources by reliability, recency, independence, bias, and coverage.

templates.title: Spec Compliance Map
templates.description: Connects spec requirements, implementation evidence, tests, exceptions, and compliance gaps.

templates.title: Topic Landscape
templates.description: Places topics by maturity, evidence density, ownership, and open questions.

templates.title: Unknowns Map
templates.description: Tracks known unknowns by impact, owner, evidence needed, and decision deadline.

templates.title: Approval Workflow
templates.description: Tracks approval requests, reviewers, policy gates, blocked actions, and final authorization.

templates.title: Automation Flow
templates.description: Maps automated steps, triggers, inputs, outputs, owners, and verification checks.

templates.title: Automation Run Replay
templates.description: Replays an automation run through triggers, actions, retries, failures, and completion.

templates.title: Checklist Progress Orbit
templates.description: Shows checklist items orbiting a goal by owner, completion state, and blocking dependency.

templates.title: Critical Path View
templates.description: Highlights the shortest path through required fixes, tests, documentation, commit, and push.

templates.title: Decision Tree
templates.description: Branches choices, criteria, consequences, owners, and fallback paths for a plan.

templates.title: Dependency Radar
templates.description: Plots dependencies by urgency, confidence, owner, risk, and schedule impact.

templates.title: Gantt Tunnel
templates.description: Shows scheduled tasks, milestones, dependencies, slippage, and critical windows.

templates.title: Goal Breakdown Tree
templates.description: Breaks a goal into deliverables, tasks, owners, validation, and dependency branches.

templates.title: Handoff Map
templates.description: Connects work products, owners, acceptance criteria, timing, and receiving teams.

templates.title: Kanban 3D
templates.description: Places cards by status, priority, owner, age, and blocked or ready state.

templates.title: Milestone Road
templates.description: Orders milestones along a delivery path with entry criteria, risks, and completion evidence.

templates.title: Parallel Sessions Map
templates.description: Shows parallel work sessions, shared files, dependencies, conflicts, and merge points.

templates.title: Plan Dag
templates.description: Arranges implementation tasks, dependencies, verification gates, and publication into a directed plan.

templates.title: Queue Scheduler View
templates.description: Organizes queued work by priority, SLA, owner, runtime window, and dispatch state.

templates.title: Resource Allocation Board
templates.description: Balances people, systems, budget, and time across workstreams and delivery risk.

templates.title: Risk Burndown
templates.description: Tracks risk reduction over time with mitigations, owners, review dates, and residual exposure.

templates.title: Runbook Execution Map
templates.description: Steps through runbook actions, operators, checks, failure branches, and completion evidence.

templates.title: Task Failure Fork
templates.description: Branches failed tasks into symptoms, retry choices, owner decisions, and recovery path.

templates.title: Task Swarm
templates.description: Coordinates many tasks by owner, dependency, status, collision risk, and convergence point.

templates.title: Capacity Planning Map
templates.description: Compares capacity demand, staffing, throughput, bottlenecks, and forecast risk.

templates.title: Churn Signal Radar
templates.description: Plots customer churn signals by account health, usage drop, support history, and renewal risk.

templates.title: Cohort Timeline
templates.description: Tracks customer cohorts through activation, retention, expansion, support, and churn events.

templates.title: Cost Cloud
templates.description: Groups infrastructure, vendor, team, and feature costs with ownership and savings targets.

templates.title: Customer Journey Map
templates.description: Orders customer touchpoints, friction, support moments, conversion points, and retention signals.

templates.title: Customer Segment Constellation
templates.description: Clusters customer segments by needs, revenue, adoption, support load, and opportunity.

templates.title: Experiment Result View
templates.description: Compares experiment variants by metric lift, guardrails, confidence, and rollout decision.

templates.title: Feature Adoption Map
templates.description: Plots feature usage by segment, account tier, activation depth, and expansion signal.

templates.title: Funnel Flow 3D
templates.description: Tracks prospects through funnel stages, conversion leaks, owners, and recovery actions.

templates.title: KPI Control Room
templates.description: Tracks product and support KPIs including active users, conversion, revenue, support tickets, SLA, and churn risk.

templates.title: Market Map
templates.description: Places market segments by size, growth, competition, fit, and entry confidence.

templates.title: Opportunity Landscape
templates.description: Plots opportunities by value, feasibility, strategic fit, confidence, and timing.

templates.title: Ops Shift Overview
templates.description: Summarizes shift workload, incidents, handoffs, queue health, and pending escalations.

templates.title: Portfolio Matrix
templates.description: Compares initiatives by value, cost, risk, strategic fit, and current investment state.

templates.title: Revenue Stream Map
templates.description: Traces revenue from customer segments through products, channels, renewals, and leakage.

templates.title: Risk Matrix 3D
templates.description: Plots business risks by likelihood, impact, velocity, mitigation owner, and residual exposure.

templates.title: Sales Pipeline 3D
templates.description: Tracks opportunities from lead through qualification, proposal, negotiation, and close.

templates.title: SLA Dashboard
templates.description: Shows SLA targets, live attainment, breach risk, support queue pressure, and ownership.

templates.title: Support Ticket Heatmap
templates.description: Plots support tickets by product area, severity, age, customer tier, and backlog pressure.

templates.title: Team Load Balance
templates.description: Compares team load, capacity, focus area, risk, and rebalancing options.

templates.title: API Lifecycle View
templates.description: Teaches how an API moves from design through implementation, versioning, deprecation, and retirement.

templates.title: Auth Flow Animation
templates.description: Teaches an authentication flow from browser login through identity provider, token exchange, session cookie, and protected API.

templates.title: Cache Behavior Sim
templates.description: Demonstrates cache hits, misses, invalidation, refresh, stampede risk, and fallback behavior.

templates.title: Compiler Pipeline View
templates.description: Explains source parsing, analysis, optimization, code generation, and diagnostics in a compiler.

templates.title: Data Lifecycle View
templates.description: Shows data creation, validation, storage, transformation, retention, and deletion stages.

templates.title: Database Query Plan
templates.description: Breaks a query plan into scans, joins, filters, indexes, cost, and execution order.

templates.title: Distributed Consensus View
templates.description: Explains proposals, votes, quorum, leader changes, replication lag, and committed state.

templates.title: Event Sourcing View
templates.description: Shows commands, events, projections, replay, snapshots, and consistency checks.

templates.title: Exploded Architecture View
templates.description: Separates an architecture into layers, responsibilities, data paths, and dependency rules.

templates.title: Memory Layout View
templates.description: Shows stack, heap, static data, pointers, allocation lifetime, and ownership boundaries.

templates.title: Migration Strategy View
templates.description: Explains phased migration from legacy path through dual write, validation, cutover, and cleanup.

templates.title: ML Pipeline View
templates.description: Maps data ingestion, feature work, training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring.

templates.title: Network Packet Path
templates.description: Follows packets through client, DNS, gateway, firewall, service, and response path.

templates.title: Payment Flow View
templates.description: Explains checkout, authorization, capture, settlement, refund, and failure handling.

templates.title: Permission Model View
templates.description: Compares roles, resources, allowed actions, denied actions, and policy inheritance.

templates.title: Process Animation
templates.description: Demonstrates process start, scheduling, IO waits, signals, completion, and failure transitions.

templates.title: Queue Processing Sim
templates.description: Shows enqueue, dispatch, worker execution, retry, dead letter, and completion behavior.

templates.title: Security Threat Model
templates.description: Maps assets, trust boundaries, attack paths, controls, and residual risks.

templates.title: State Transition Tutorial
templates.description: Teaches states, events, guards, allowed transitions, and terminal outcomes with examples.

templates.title: Tradeoff Stage
templates.description: Compares design tradeoffs by learning goal, benefit, cost, risk, and when to choose each option.
